hero.description: I develop custom websites with WordPress, PHP and modern technologies. I transform ideas into fast, accessible, results-driven digital experiences.

about.title: About me
about.description: I'm a web developer with over 10 years of experience creating customized digital solutions. Specialized in WordPress and PHP, I combine technical skills with UX vision to build sites that not only work, but convert.
about.passion: I'm passionate about transforming complex ideas into simple, effective interfaces. I believe good web development should be invisible: fast, accessible and results-driven.
